title: The Adam Lilith Connection Sperm Meets Egg
display_title: The Adam Lilith Connection Sperm Meets Egg
wikitext:
[]: The Adam-Lilith Connection: Sperm Meets Egg             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Wed Jul 17, 2013 12:51 am Something occurred to me reading posts around here of late -- specifically some stuff in the Wunder thread (like about how it looks like a sperm, and the "womb" is actually a nucleus) and some stuff in the "will we see Lilith in Final" thread. It all started when it was pointed out (or rather, re-pointed out) by UrsusArctos that the Wunder resembles a giant sperm. Others previously have theorized that the Wunder might be a ship used by the Adams. That Eva-01 is being used as the nucleus of what I now recognize as a sperm lends something to that -- there is, at the least, an apparent connection between the Evas and the Wunder, and if Eva-01 is an Adam (like Eva-09, the Wunder's original master might have been) then maybe the Adams are themselves the nuclei of giant sperm. Maybe that's why so many of them tend towards being all-core (which Eva-01 was found to be when it was discovered in the satellite, correct?), because they are the cores of the sperm-ships like the Wunder. As a result of vague imaginings that maybe we'll see the Wunder "fertilize" the Egg of Lilith in Final, I realized something: What if the Adams are designed to fuse with Lilith just like a sperm fertilizes an egg, and a ship like the Wunder is for the purpose of delivering an Adam as a payload to Lilith in her egg? As a result of this I noticed something else: What if what causes an Impact is the combination of Lilith, Adam, human, and Angel all together? N3I in 2.0: Shinji - human. Rei - Lilith. Eva-01 - Adam. Zeruel - Angel. N4I in 3.0: Shinji - human. Lilith - Lilith. Eva-13 - Adam. Kaworu - Angel. It's obviously not that simple, since there was that whole Spear business and there was the involvement of the 12th Angel in the case of N4I (maybe just to transfer Lilith into Eva-13? Maybe the lack of the Spears is an important difference between N3I and 3I?), but those elements remain the same and seem to be very important. In conclusion, what I'm really presenting here is a theory to finally fit together why Eva-01 should be one of the Four Adams and what that would mean, rather than a clone of Lilith as per NGE, because I think we can explain what happened at the end of 2.0 that way and identify commonalities between it and what happens in 3.0. It explains why the elements that we recognize as important in N3I (the combination of Eva-01, Zeruel, Rei, and Shinji) are important. I think there's a vastly different settei (is that the right word?) this time around for Adam and Lilith and their relationship; I think the Adams are more definitively male or at least representative of maleness this time around, and I got that idea from the concept that the Wunder might be a giant sperm-ship used by the Adams to deliver an Adam straight to Lilith in her egg to fertilize her. And in that way, the union of Adam and Lilith creating an Impact is symbolic of the union of male and female, the union of sperm and egg, with an Adam as the sperm nucleus and Lilith as the egg nucleus. I bet there is no White Moon this time. I bet the Wunder is it. Lilith is the nucleus of her egg, an Adam is the nucleus of the sperm, and when the twain meet (and other conditions are met apparently), an Impact results. EDIT: ...Since I'm on a role, I wanna continue with new thoughts that occurred to me. Why 4 Adams? Maybe the number is not at all mystical. Maybe there are simply 4 surviving Adams out of some unknown number. In the act of sex leading to fertilization, there are lots of sperm competing to meet one egg; the multiplicity of Adams represents this. Who knows what happened at Second Impact, but maybe it destroyed an unknown number of other Adams and all but one surviving sperm-ship, the Wunder. Perhaps the Wunder originally belonged to Eva-09 in this setup. That just sort of sprang from my mind. Not sure what role Angels and humans play in all this yet. EDIT 2: I thought of another question that can be answered by this framework: Why is it okay for Rei to be in Eva-00 but not in Eva-01 (as seems to be implied in I think 1.0)? There seem to be only 4 "true" Adams, so maybe a mere clone is "safe". Alternatively, maybe every Eva but the special 4 are all actually Lilith clones this time around. That would be hilarious. It would also explain why Zeruel ate Eva-00, perhaps mistaking it for Lilith.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Wed Jul 17, 2013 3:57 am So according to your theory, in the NTE continuity the FAR(or their equivalent) plan consisted not in sending Fruits of Live and Knowledge on different Moons to end in different worlds(ADAM and Lilith ending on the same planet being a freak accident), this time Lilith was deliberately sent on Earth to bring life to it and create a whole ecosystem with the Fruit of Knowledge, and after some time the ADAMs would come inside an ark(the current AAA Wunder) to fuse with Lilith and evolve the FoK beings into beings with a FoL(and probably still having their FoK) But somehow something happened during the process, the ADAMs crashed at the other side of the world and fell into a deep slumber, letting the Lilin continue to live and develop their civilization. Then SEELE discover the SDSS, understand that there was a "ritual of artificial evolution" which should have happened a long time ago, and decided to put back the FAR plan in the rails, but needed time and a technological level far beyond the one the Lilin currently had, so they "gave mankind the gift of civilization" as Gendo said and guided mankind's evolution from the shadow to be ready for the promised day were the HIP would be set into motion and the ritual of artificial evolution finally applied to mankind. Off course the question would be then what the fuck SEELE actually are, did the SDSS had some information about how "changing the shape of the soul" which let hem take the immortal form of monolith, are they some of th felled ADAMs or FAR navigators that decided to graft a FoK on themselves and take the completion of the FAR plan into their hands? That's an interesting theory, although I have the feeling we are seeing too much in the Wunder : the lower part has the shape of a sperm right, but it also have a giant bird-like head and wings, not something very sperm-like! As for your question on the EDIT 2, it could also be the other way around : EVA-01 directly made from Lilith and Rei having Lilith' soul like in NGE, and what Gendo and Fuyu feared if they make her pilot it is that if something happens and the plug depth begin to be too important or worse, than EVA-01 goes berserk, it could absorb Rei and resurrect Lilith right on the spot, which could led to a catastrophe if the Angel she's fighting is still here(or it could go against SEELE's scenario for whatever reason)

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Wed Jul 17, 2013 5:15 am If I recall correctly, gchristnsn/Mt. Olympus had a similar theory about the FoI being like sperm cells attempting to fertilise Lilith, based on similarities between post-timeskip Central Dogma and a certain manga (the name escapes me- Apollo's something-or-other). It certainly is an interesting theory but I'm not sure if it holds any water on not.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Wed Jul 17, 2013 10:11 am Food for thought, indeed. But that does raise the question of what the hell they uncovered at the South Pole this time. Kaworu describes himself as "the First Angel, cast down to Thirteenth", so if Kaworu the bishonen was the First Angel, what was down at the South Pole that caused 2I to happen? ElMariachi wrote: That's an interesting theory, although I have the feeling we are seeing too much in the Wunder : the lower part has the shape of a sperm right, but it also have a giant bird-like head and wings, not something very sperm-like!
